options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: completion_type
options.description: Set goal for game completion

options.name: area_rando
options.description: Randomize Entrances

options.name: buddy_checks
options.description: Bob-omb Buddies are checks, Cannon Unlocks are items

options.name: exclamation_boxes
options.description:
Include 1Up Exclamation Boxes during randomization.
Adds 29 locations to the pool.

options.name: progressive_keys
options.description: Keys will first grant you access to the Basement, then to the Second Floor

options.name: enable_coin_stars
options.description:
Determine logic for 100 Coin Stars.

Off - Removed from pool. You can still collect them, but they don't do anything.
Optimal for ignoring 100 Coin Stars entirely. Removes 15 locations from the pool.

On - Kept in pool, potentially randomized.

Vanilla - Kept in pool, but NOT randomized.

options.name: enable_locked_paintings
options.description:
Determine how paintings are treated.

Off - Paintings are not locked, as long as you can access them you can enter them (Vanilla behavior).

On - Paintings (other than BoB) start off locked and 11 stars are replaced in the pool with items to allow access to them.
Attempting to enter a locked painting will simply kick Mario out.
Does not affect secrets and levels that don't have a painting (BBH, HMC, RR).
This only affects the ability for Mario to enter a painting, the destination of the painting may change due to Entrance Randomization, if it is enabled.

options.name: strict_cap_requirements
options.description: If disabled, Stars that expect special caps may have to be acquired without the caps

options.name: strict_cannon_requirements
options.description:
If disabled, Stars that expect cannons may have to be acquired without them.
Has no effect if Buddy Checks and Move Randomizer are disabled

options.name: enable_move_rando
options.description:
Mario is unable to perform some actions until a corresponding item is picked up.
This option is incompatible with builds using a 'nomoverando' branch.
Specific actions to randomize can be specified in the YAML.

options.name: move_rando_actions
options.description: Which actions to randomize when Move Randomizer is enabled

options.name: strict_move_requirements
options.description:
If disabled, Stars that expect certain moves may have to be acquired without them. Only makes a difference
if Move Randomization is enabled

options.name: amount_of_stars
options.description:
How many stars exist.
If there aren't enough locations to hold the given total, the total will be reduced.

options.name: first_bowser_star_door_cost
options.description: What percent of the total stars are required at the Star Door to Bowser in the Dark World

options.name: basement_star_door_cost
options.description: What percent of the total stars are required at the Star Door in the Basement

options.name: second_floor_star_door_cost
options.description: What percent of the total stars are required to access the third floor

options.name: mips1_cost
options.description: What percent of the total stars are required to spawn MIPS the first time

options.name: mips2_cost
options.description: What percent of the total stars are required to spawn MIPS the second time.

options.name: stars_to_finish
options.description: What percent of the total stars are required at the infinite stairs

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
